mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_course (course_id, name, subject_preset, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{po.courseId}, #{po.name}, #{po.subjectPreset}, #{po.description}, #{po.createdAt}, #{po.updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), subject_preset = VALUES(subject_preset), description = VALUES(description), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM learning_course ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_chapter (chapter_id, course_id, title, chapter_order, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{po.chapterId}, #{po.courseId}, #{po.title}, #{po.chapterOrder}, #{po.description}, #{po.createdAt}, #{po.updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), chapter_order = VALUES(chapter_order), description = VALUES(description), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM course_chapter WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY chapter_order ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_course_binding (material_id, course_id, chapter_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{po.materialId}, #{po.courseId}, #{po.chapterId}, #{po.createdAt}, #{po.updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE course_id = VALUES(course_id), chapter_id = VALUES(chapter_id), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO knowledge_point (knowledge_point_id, course_id, chapter_id, material_id, chunk_id, name, description, source_snippet, weight, created_at) VALUES (#{po.knowledgePointId}, #{po.courseId}, #{po.chapterId}, #{po.materialId}, #{po.chunkId}, #{po.name}, #{po.description}, #{po.sourceSnippet}, #{po.weight}, #{po.createdAt})
